textByHashes.fb83bdc8f2188c5707f26b28a37accc6f84884b0: [sniff] They won't let me take an arrowhead as a souvenir.
textByHashes.47455943d1e9ffc1a1ca954f933ee48f04645287: I wonder what they're doing behind that rope.
textByHashes.0f300c01e4a98af07a97a40a9e0278b9c8bbcfa2: Can you find my teacher? I need the toilet!
textByHashes.a120df7a9b380e580fdb459220fd0ddfdb2c74e3: Teacher! Can we go to the Natural History exhibit now?
textByHashes.73ddb9f3fb3ebb070d4974a6d64c55a2a9020070: I wanna be an archaeologist when I grow up!
